# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions: write-all

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build-and-publish:
    name: Build and Publish Packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install build dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci || npm install
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip build twine

      - name: Build packages
        run: |
          npm run build --if-present
          python -m build

      - name: Publish npm package
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: npm publish --access public

      - name: Publish Python package
        if: ${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml', 'setup.py') != '' }}
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: twine upload dist/*

  create-release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-and-publish
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Create GitHub release
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          gh release create "$TAG" \
            --title "$TAG" \
            --generate-notes

  update-documentation:
    name: Update Documentation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: create-release
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Install docs dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci || npm install

      - name: Generate documentation
        run: |
          npm run docs --if-present
          mkdir -p docs
          echo "Release ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" > docs/latest-release.txt

      - name: Commit and push documentation updates
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add docs
          git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "docs: update for ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          git push origin HEAD:${{ github.event.repository.default_branch }}
